changesProposed.name: SpaceX

verified.name: SpaceX
verified.description: American spaceflight, telecommunications, and artificial intelligence company headquartered in Starbase, Texas. Operates three divisions: Space (orbital launches), Connectivity (Starlink satellite communications), and Artificial Intelligence (Grok, X, data centers).
verified.notes: Wikipedia source indicates IPO occurred June 12, 2026, raising $86B and making it the largest IPO in history. Database entry claims 'preparing for IPO' but source confirms IPO already completed. Elon Musk ownership listed as 42% equity with 85% voting control in Wikipedia (database says 82% voting control—discrepancy noted but 85% is from primary source). No valuation figure found in provided sources to verify the $1.65T claim.

changesProposed.name: Terran Robotics

verified.name: Terran Robotics
verified.description: Company developing terraforming robots that combine robotics and adobe materials to construct residential homes and commercial structures. The company aims to address housing affordability through automated earthen construction methods.
verified.notes: Source [2] appears to be about a different company (Monumental) and does not contain information about Terran Robotics. Database entry lists 9 investors and $256K raised; the NSF SBIR grant of $256K is verified in source [1], but other investors cannot be verified from provided sources. Current stage cannot be verified as sources do not explicitly state funding round designation.
